title: 02912_On_Path_to_Multimodal_Generalist_General-Level_and_General-Bench
positive_examples: Strict compliance with privacy regulations, ensuring no personally identifiable information (PII) is used.
Fair compensation for human annotators, promoting ethical labor practices.
Active measures to analyze and mitigate biases related to gender, ethnicity, and language.
negative_examples: Potential biases in AI systems that may not be completely eradicated.
Challenges in ensuring complete fairness and representation in the dataset.
